title: bug with installing from source on ubuntu-20.04
body:
**environment:**
docker container running the following image:
`summerwind/actions-runner:ubuntu-20.04`

**what commands I ran:**

```shell
        sudo apt-get -y update
        # sudo apt-get -y install skopeo
        sudo apt install -y libgpgme-dev libassuan-dev libbtrfs-dev libdevmapper-dev pkg-config
        curl -OL https://golang.org/dl/go1.16.7.linux-amd64.tar.gz
        sudo tar -C /usr/local -xvf go1.16.7.linux-amd64.tar.gz
        export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin
        export GOPATH=/usr/local/go
        export GO111MODULE=on
        export GOROOT=/usr/local/go
        sudo mkdir -p $GOPATH/src/github.com/containers/skopeo
        sudo git clone --depth 1 --branch v1.13.3 https://github.com/containers/skopeo $GOPATH/src/github.com/containers/skopeo
        cd $GOPATH/src/github.com/containers/skopeo && sudo make bin/skopeo
```

**error seen:**

```
runner@ubuntu-0248987:/usr/local/go/src/github.com/containers/skopeo$ sudo make bin/skopeo
go build "-buildmode=pie" -ldflags '-X main.gitCommit=9e29e4cede9bdaa4a54aa5b0af86efedb823bde4 ' -gcflags "" -tags "   " -o bin/skopeo ./cmd/skopeo
vendor/github.com/klauspost/compress/zstd/blockdec.go:18:2: //go:build comment without // +build comment
vendor/github.com/containers/storage/pkg/chunked/internal/compression.go:16:2: //go:build comment without // +build comment
vendor/github.com/mattn/go-runewidth/runewidth.go:7:2: //go:build comment without // +build comment
vendor/github.com/sigstore/rekor/pkg/client/rekor_client.go:28:2: //go:build comment without // +build comment
vendor/github.com/vbauerster/mpb/v8/progress.go:13:2: //go:build comment without // +build comment
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/openshift/openshift-copies.go:11:2: cannot find package "." in:
	/usr/local/go/src/github.com/containers/skopeo/vendor/net/netip
make: *** [Makefile:134: bin/skopeo] Error 1
```

comments.body:
If I instead use go version `go1.13.8 linux/amd64`, and do `sudo make` , then I get this error:

```
build github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pkg/pwalkdir: cannot load github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pkg/pwalkdir: no Go source files
make: *** [Makefile:134: bin/skopeo] Error 1
```
Thanks for reaching out. Go ≥ 1.19 is required to build recent versions, nothing earlier will work.
That works. Thanks! You can close this
